Looking ahead to 2026, Biotalys provided a positive outlook, anticipating further growth and expansion in their operations.

data.title: Hepsor AS consolidated unaudited interim report for Q1 2026
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Hepsor experienced a surge in both sales and construction efforts. The Group saw a remarkable uptick in apartment construction and sales activity. Throughout the quarter, Hepsor finalized a total of 72 initial home sales. Of these, 54 were homes in progress while 18 were in finished buildings. The Group's overall assets saw a substantial rise to 97 million euros by the quarter's end, marking a 6% increase from the start of the reporting year. By the quarter's closure, Hepsor had 428 new homes under construction, a significant jump from the 152 homes being built by March 31, 2025. Moving forward, Hepsor anticipates continued asset growth. The upcoming quarters will include commencing construction on 207 new homes and 9,623 square meters of new commercial spaces.

data.title: Fiverr Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Fiverr International Ltd. (NYSE: FVRR) announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, known for revolutionizing collaborative work globally, shared its additional operating results and management insights in a shareholder letter available on its investor relations website at investors.fiverr.com. This update was made public on April 29, 2026, showcasing the company's performance in the current quarter.

data.title: Borregaard ASA: EBITDA1 of NOK 428 million in the 1st quarter
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Borregaard reported operating revenues of NOK 2.005 billion, slightly lower than the previous year at NOK 2.036 billion. EBITDA stood at NOK 428 million, down from NOK 511 million. Fine Chemicals saw an increase in results, however, BioSolutions and BioMaterials experienced lower results compared to the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: 28.13%, 26.4%! LONGi Sets New World Records for Crystalline Silicon Solar Cell and Module Efficiency
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on April 29, 2026, LONGi revealed two significant advancements in technology. One notable achievement is the certification of their independently created Hybrid Interdigitated-Back-Contact (HIBC) solar cell by the Institute for Solar Energy Research Hamelin (ISFH) in Germany.

data.title: Robinhood's Q1 earnings fall short as crypto revenue, volume drop about 50%, causing share prices to drop 10%.
data.description: In the first quarter of the year, Robinhood reported earnings per share and revenue figures that fell short of industry projections. This led to a drop of almost 10% in the company's stock value.

data.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy firm has been crucial in Bitcoin's recent surge, with ETFs and whale purchases also playing a part - Bitwise CIO.
data.description: The recent surge in Bitcoin's value has been primarily fueled by ongoing purchases from Michael Saylor's treasury firm, Strategy, as per Bitwise's chief investment officer. Although Bitcoin exchange-traded funds and large-scale purchases by significant investors have played a role, a notable driving force behind the rally has been the consistent buying activity from Saylor's firm.
